weeklyFocus.headline: Verified April 23: iPhone 17e switcher offer, Better Value, and HINT Month On Us
weeklyFocus.context: Use verified public T-Mobile offers only: iPhone 17e On Us for eligible port-ins with no trade-in, iPhone 17 Pro up to $830 off with trade on Experience More, Galaxy S26 Ultra up to $800 off with add-a-line, Better Value family pricing, and Home Internet Month On Us plus up to $300 back with code MONTHONUS.

trending.buzz: iPhone 17e On Us — no trade-in needed for eligible port-ins
trending.repTip: Use this for switchers first: qualifying credit, eligible port-in, and $45+/mo plan with AutoPay required; up to $630 via 24 monthly bill credits.

trending.buzz: T-Satellite is an off-grid app story, not just a texting story
trending.source: T-Mobile T-Satellite page and support page
trending.repTip: Talk about WhatsApp, AllTrails, Google Maps, AccuWeather, T-Life, and other optimized apps, but set expectations around outdoor use and limited satellite data speeds.

trending.buzz: Home Internet Month On Us plus up to $300 back
trending.repTip: Check the address early, use code MONTHONUS, and set expectations: bill credit may take 2 cycles; rebate card can take up to 14 weeks after submission.

trending.buzz: Better Value remains the family-plan anchor
trending.source: T-Mobile plan pages and Better Value newsroom
trending.repTip: Best fit is 3+ line households: $140+/mo with AutoPay, 3+ new lines and 2 eligible ports for new customers, plus T-Satellite and 5-Year Price Guarantee.

currentPromos.name: iPhone 17e On Us (Eligible Port-In)
currentPromos.details: No trade-in needed for eligible port-ins. Requires qualifying credit, qualifying $45+/mo service with AutoPay, eligible port-in, active line, and 24 monthly bill credits up to $630.

commonObjections.objection: I don't want 24 months of bill credits
commonObjections.response: The offer is delivered as monthly bill credits, not an annual service contract. Set the expectation clearly: credits stop if the account or line stops qualifying.

currentPromos.name: iPhone 17 Pro — Up to $830 Off With Trade
currentPromos.details: Trade in an eligible device on Experience More or qualifying Go5G Plus and save up to $830 via 24 monthly bill credits. Requires qualifying credit, $85+/mo service with AutoPay, tax, and device connection charge.

commonObjections.objection: My trade-in probably isn't worth anything
commonObjections.response: Do not guess. Check the device first, then show the exact credit tier so the customer sees the real monthly math.

currentPromos.name: Galaxy S26 Ultra — Up to $800 Off Add-a-Line
currentPromos.details: Save up to $800 on Galaxy S26 Ultra via 24 monthly bill credits when adding a line on an Experience or Better Value plan. Requires qualifying credit and service.

commonObjections.response: Keep it customer-led: if they are Apple-first, pivot to the iPhone 17e or iPhone 17 Pro offers. If they want camera, S Pen, and big-screen productivity, show the S26 Ultra math.

currentPromos.name: Home Internet Month On Us + Up to $300 Back
currentPromos.details: Use code MONTHONUS at checkout for a month via bill credit, plus up to $300 back by plan tier after rebate registration: $100 Rely, $200 Amplified, $300 All-In. New qualifying Internet line required.

commonObjections.objection: I already have internet at home
commonObjections.response: Start with the address check and plan fit. If available, show the Month On Us plus rebate value and remind them there is no annual contract.

currentPromos.name: Pay Off Your Phone — Up to $800/Line
currentPromos.details: Limited-time switcher reimbursement up to $800/line via virtual prepaid Mastercard for eligible remaining device balances or carrier early termination fees. Requires new financed smartphone, eligible trade-in, port-in, qualifying service, proof submission, and active good standing.

commonObjections.objection: I still owe money on my phone
commonObjections.response: That is exactly when to verify payoff eligibility. Explain the proof submission and prepaid Mastercard timeline before promising the switch math.

currentPromos.name: Better Value Family Plan
currentPromos.details: Limited-time family plan starts at $140+/mo for 3 lines with AutoPay, plus taxes and fees. New customers need 3+ new lines and 2 eligible port-ins. Includes premium-data benefits, T-Satellite, 2-year upgrade path, entertainment perks, $5 watch/tablet lines, and 5-Year Price Guarantee.

commonObjections.response: Correct. Do not force it onto 1-2 line accounts. Use Experience More or Experience Beyond for smaller households and bring Better Value back when 3+ lines are real.

planUpdates.change: Premium Experience plan with yearly upgrade eligibility, strong device offers, T-Satellite included, premium entertainment benefits, hotspot, 4K streaming, and international data features.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Use Beyond when the customer values yearly upgrades, the strongest phone offers, travel, satellite, and premium entertainment more than the lowest monthly price.

planUpdates.change: Mid-premium Experience plan with 2-year upgrade eligibility, strong trade-in offers, premium data, Netflix benefit, and Apple TV discounted/included benefit depending on current terms.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Use More as the smaller-household sweet spot: better promos and perks without making the customer pay for yearly upgrades.

planUpdates.change: Limited-time family plan for 3+ lines. Public T-Mobile terms list $140+/mo for 3 lines with AutoPay, plus taxes/fees, 3+ new lines and 2 eligible ports for new customers, T-Satellite, entertainment perks, $5 watch/tablet lines, 2-year upgrade eligibility, and 5-Year Price Guarantee.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Best family-plan anchor when the account truly has 3+ lines. Verify line and port requirements before positioning device promos.

planUpdates.change: Budget unlimited lane. Public device offers still reference qualifying Essentials or $45+/mo service for some iPhone 17e switcher paths, but promo value is narrower than Experience or Better Value.
planUpdates.talkingPoint: Use Essentials for true budget buyers, then compare what they lose in promos, perks, and upgrade paths.

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Mobile's Apple deals page cites HarrisX Billing Snapshots showing families with 3+ lines saved $3,700 vs AT&T and Verizon over five years.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Use it as a value proof point, not a guaranteed bill quote: 'T-Mobile says families like yours have saved meaningfully over time, so let's compare your actual bill.'

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Mobile Home Internet Contract Freedom reimburses eligible previous internet provider early termination fees up to $750 via virtual prepaid card.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: If a cable contract is the blocker, check HINT availability and explain the ETF reimbursement requirements before promising timing.

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Satellite can be added by non-T-Mobile customers for $10/mo with eligible unlocked phones, while Experience Beyond and Better Value include T-Satellite in current public terms.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Satellite is a differentiation hook: if they hike, camp, road trip, or work in dead zones, connect the plan to a real use case.

competitiveIntel.intel: T-Mobile positions Better Value around 3+ line households, 2-year upgrade eligibility, T-Satellite, entertainment perks, and a 5-Year Price Guarantee.
competitiveIntel.talkingPoint: Do not lead with every perk. Pick the one that matches the customer: price lock, satellite, entertainment, or upgrade cadence.

knownIssues.issue: Bill credits may take up to 2 billing cycles to appear on all promo devices
knownIssues.workaround: Set expectations upfront: credits typically start on the 2nd bill; escalate to care if missing after 2 full cycles.

knownIssues.issue: 90-day cancel rule: Customers who cancelled lines in past 90 days may need to reactivate before qualifying for promos
knownIssues.workaround: Check account history and guide them to reactivate first if they cancelled within 90 days.

knownIssues.issue: Home Internet prepaid card takes up to 14 weeks from rebate submission
knownIssues.workaround: Set expectations: register the code within 30 days of activation; card expires 6 months after issuance.

knownIssues.issue: Home Internet credits stop if you cancel any lines or change plans
knownIssues.workaround: Warn customers: bundle discount and promo credits stop if they cancel voice lines or switch plans.

knownIssues.issue: Better Value plan not available for 1 or 2 lines — minimum 3 lines required
knownIssues.workaround: Steer 1-2 line customers to Experience More or Experience Beyond instead.

openers: Checking things out for yourself or the whole family?
discovery: What phone and carrier are you on now?
What matters most — price, the phone, coverage, or extras like streaming?
keyMoves: Lead with verified fit: iPhone 17e On Us for eligible port-ins, or iPhone 17 Pro savings when trade-in is real.
Mention the right perk only after discovery: satellite, entertainment, price lock, or upgrade cadence.
Use the $3,700 savings stat as a comparison starter, then verify the customer's actual bill.
closingTips: No pressure: 'Let me save this so you have the numbers when you're ready.'
Urgency: 'These device and Home Internet offers are limited-time, so let's verify eligibility while they are still live.'
avoidMoves: Don't push hard — buyers need space.
Don't overwhelm with promos — pick the one that fits.

openers: Let's get you set up — what are you looking to grab today?
Great timing — do you know what device you want or want a recommendation?
discovery: How many lines do you need?
Switching from another carrier? We can pay off your phone up to $800.
keyMoves: Move quickly — they're ready; don't over-explain.
For true 3+ line households: Better Value at $140+/mo with AutoPay can be the family anchor.
Before checkout: 'Do you want me to check whether Home Internet is available at your address too?'
closingTips: Direct: 'I can get you set up in 15 minutes with same-day delivery.'
After device: pitch watch or tablet line at $5/mo.
avoidMoves: Don't slow them down with too many options.
Don't forget Home Internet — ask every customer.

openers: Looking to upgrade or add someone to the account?
Adding a line for someone, or upgrading your own device?
discovery: What device are you on now? Let's check trade-in value.
What plan are you on? Newer plans may unlock bigger device deals.
keyMoves: Check trade-in value immediately — show them the math.
If on old plan: compare to Experience More or Better Value for streaming and T-Satellite.
Always ask: 'Who's your home internet provider?'
closingTips: Show side-by-side: current cost vs new plan with credits and streaming value.
avoidMoves: Don't assume they want the same brand — ask.
Better Value requires 3+ lines; don't pitch to solo customers.

openers: Let me pull that up and get it sorted.
No worries — what's the order number or what are you seeing?
discovery: When did you place the order?
Did you get a confirmation email or tracking number?
keyMoves: Resolve their issue FIRST — earn trust before pivoting.
Set expectations: bill credits can take up to 2 billing cycles.
After resolution: 'By the way, do you have home internet? Month On Us deal right now.'
closingTips: Service-to-sales: 'All set! Quick question — who's your home internet provider?'
Home Internet: 'If your address qualifies, there is a Month On Us and up to $300 back path. Want me to check?'
avoidMoves: Don't pitch before resolving their issue.
Don't make them feel the support call was just a sales opportunity.

openers: Let's figure this out — what's going on with your device?
No stress — walk me through what you're seeing.
keyMoves: Fix the issue first — build trust and gratitude.
After fix: pivot to Protection 360 — '$0 screen repairs.'
Always ask about Home Internet while you have them.
closingTips: Gratitude pivot: 'Glad that's working! Do you have a smartwatch or tracker?'
P360 pitch: 'If you had P360, this would be fully covered.'
avoidMoves: Don't rush the fix to get to the sale.
If they're frustrated, skip the sales pivot entirely.

openers: Let me pull up your account — what do you need help with?
No problem — is this about billing, plan changes, or something else?
discovery: What specifically are you seeing on your account?
How long have you been with T-Mobile?
keyMoves: While in the account: look for old plans, missing P360, no Home Internet.
If 3+ lines: mention Better Value at $140+/mo with AutoPay and verify the exact account requirements.
closingTips: 'While I was in your account, I noticed a couple things that could save you money — want to hear them?'
Home Internet: 'No annual contract, 5-Year Price Guarantee on eligible internet plans, Month On Us, and up to $300 back when qualified.'
avoidMoves: Don't upsell if they're frustrated about a billing error — fix it first.
Be careful with plan changes on accounts with active bill credits — can kill existing promos.

planSellingGuide.positioning: The premium plan — yearly upgrades, T-Satellite, strongest device eligibility, and premium entertainment.
planSellingGuide.idealCustomer: Premium seekers, frequent travelers, tech enthusiasts, families who want it all.
planSellingGuide.whyNotCheaper: You lose yearly upgrades, T-Satellite, and the best device deals. The difference is $15/line — less than one streaming subscription.
planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: This IS the top tier. Nothing above this.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Always have the latest phone without waiting 2 years.
whyItMatters.family: Hand down last year's phone to the kids — everyone stays current.
whyItMatters.senior: Your phone never falls behind on updates or support.
whyItMatters.business: Always have the best camera and tools for work.
whyItMatters.budget: Trade value stays high when you upgrade yearly — saves money long-term.
whyItMatters.switcher: You're already switching — start with yearly upgrades built in.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Festival in the desert? Camping? Your phone still works.
whyItMatters.family: Kids on a trip with no signal? They can still reach you.
whyItMatters.senior: Peace of mind — your phone works even in remote areas.
whyItMatters.business: Never miss a critical message, even in dead zones.
whyItMatters.budget: You'd pay $10/mo to add this on a cheaper plan. It's included here.
whyItMatters.switcher: No other carrier has this — genuine T-Mobile exclusive.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Streaming value helps offset the premium plan cost.
whyItMatters.family: Entertainment perks can replace separate subscriptions on the household budget.
whyItMatters.senior: One wireless plan can carry key entertainment benefits without more shopping.
whyItMatters.business: Entertainment for travel downtime is built into the premium value story.
whyItMatters.budget: Do the real math: included or discounted entertainment can narrow the price gap.
whyItMatters.switcher: It gives you a concrete non-phone reason to switch beyond the device deal.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Flagship phone promos are strongest when the plan qualifies.
whyItMatters.family: Multiple qualifying lines can make device credits add up fast.
whyItMatters.senior: Use the plan to unlock better device math, then verify eligibility line by line.
whyItMatters.business: Strong device credits can lower the cost of refreshing team equipment.
whyItMatters.budget: The plan may cost more, but the device and perk math can offset it.
whyItMatters.switcher: Use current verified offers, not old launch claims, to make the switch worth it.

demographicPitch.young-adult: Yearly upgrades, satellite for festivals and trips, and premium entertainment value. The plan that keeps up with you.
demographicPitch.family: Best phone eligibility, entertainment value, and T-Satellite so the kids can reach you off-grid. Verify the exact 3-line quote before closing.
demographicPitch.senior: Your phone always works — even in remote areas. Streaming included, new phone every year.
demographicPitch.business: Best devices, global roaming in 215+ countries, satellite backup for dead zones. Professional-grade wireless.
demographicPitch.budget: Entertainment value + yearly upgrades + T-Satellite can make Beyond cost less than the sticker price suggests.
demographicPitch.switcher: Strong current phone offers, yearly upgrades, and satellite connectivity. The plan that makes the switch worth it.

planSellingGuide.upgradeFrom: You're paying for data you can't fully use. Beyond unlocks 4K streaming, yearly upgrades, and T-Satellite — for about $15 more per line.
planSellingGuide.anchorPrice: $57/line for 3 lines — less than $2/day per person.

planSellingGuide.positioning: The sweet spot. Great deals, all the perks, 2-year upgrades.
planSellingGuide.idealCustomer: Individuals, couples, people who want premium without the top price.
planSellingGuide.whyNotCheaper: Essentials loses streaming perks and gets worse device deals.
planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: Beyond adds yearly upgrades and T-Satellite — worth it only if you upgrade phones often or travel to remote areas.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Entertainment value helps close the gap with Essentials.
whyItMatters.family: Streaming value can replace separate subscriptions for small households.
whyItMatters.business: Entertainment value is useful for travel and downtime.
whyItMatters.budget: The streaming value can make this cheaper than Essentials plus separate subscriptions.
whyItMatters.switcher: It gives you a perk story without needing the top-tier yearly upgrade plan.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Trade your current phone and get a flagship for nearly free.
whyItMatters.family: Good trade-in deals across multiple lines add up fast.
whyItMatters.senior: Your old phone is worth more than you think toward a new one.
whyItMatters.business: Solid device deals keep equipment costs low.
whyItMatters.budget: Trade-in credits can make your monthly device payment close to $0.
whyItMatters.switcher: Great deals even with a trade — and we'll pay off your old phone too.

whyItMatters.young-adult: No throttling at concerts, games, or crowded areas.
whyItMatters.family: Everyone streams and scrolls without slowdowns.
whyItMatters.senior: Reliable speeds for video calls with family.
whyItMatters.business: Consistent performance for video meetings and file uploads.
whyItMatters.budget: Premium data means you actually get what you pay for.
whyItMatters.switcher: Same premium network priority as our top-tier plans.

whyItMatters.young-adult: New phone every 2 years with the same deals as new customers.
whyItMatters.family: Regular refresh cycle keeps everyone's devices current.
whyItMatters.senior: Upgrade when your phone starts feeling outdated.
whyItMatters.business: Predictable 2-year device refresh for the team.
whyItMatters.budget: Every 2 years you get new-customer pricing again.
whyItMatters.switcher: You're not locked in forever — upgrade with top deals every 2 years.

demographicPitch.young-adult: Entertainment value, premium data, and strong device deals without paying for yearly upgrades you might not use.
demographicPitch.family: Entertainment value plus solid trade-in deals. Great for couples or small families.
demographicPitch.senior: Streaming included, reliable data, and a new phone every 2 years. Simple and premium.
demographicPitch.business: Premium data, device deals, and streaming perks at a sensible price point.
demographicPitch.budget: Once you add up the streaming value ($30/mo), Experience More is actually cheaper than Essentials + separate subscriptions.
demographicPitch.switcher: Great device deals, all streaming included, premium data. The plan most switchers land on.

planSellingGuide.upgradeFrom: You're missing premium data, stronger device offers, and entertainment value on your current plan. Experience More can add those without jumping to yearly upgrades.

planSellingGuide.positioning: Everything families need at the best price. 3 lines required.
planSellingGuide.idealCustomer: Families with 3+ lines who want Netflix, HINT bundle, and good deals.
planSellingGuide.whyNotCheaper: Essentials doesn't include streaming or T-Satellite.
planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: Beyond adds yearly upgrades — most families don't need that.

whyItMatters.young-adult: $30+/mo in streaming built into the family plan.
whyItMatters.family: Movie night and off-grid reach both become part of the family plan story.
whyItMatters.senior: All your shows included, no extra bills to manage.
whyItMatters.business: Streaming perks for the whole household at no added cost.
whyItMatters.budget: This streaming alone is worth more than the price difference from Essentials.
whyItMatters.switcher: You get premium-style benefits on a family plan built around value.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Your phone works at festivals, camping, anywhere off-grid.
whyItMatters.family: Kids can reach you even where there's no cell signal.
whyItMatters.senior: Peace of mind in remote areas — your phone still connects.
whyItMatters.business: Stay reachable everywhere, even in dead zones.
whyItMatters.budget: Included here; it's a $10/mo add-on on cheaper plans.
whyItMatters.switcher: Only T-Mobile has satellite connectivity — a real switching reason.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Connect your watch or tablet for just $5/mo.
whyItMatters.family: Kids' tablets stay connected for $5/mo each — great for road trips.
whyItMatters.senior: A connected watch with fall detection for just $5/mo.
whyItMatters.business: Add a tablet for field work at $5/mo per device.
whyItMatters.budget: Cheapest connected device lines in the industry.
whyItMatters.switcher: No other carrier offers $5/mo watch and tablet lines.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Your rate is locked — no surprise price hikes.
whyItMatters.family: Budget with confidence knowing your bill won't change for 5 years.
whyItMatters.senior: Fixed-income friendly — your wireless bill stays predictable.
whyItMatters.business: Lock in costs for 5 years of budget certainty.
whyItMatters.budget: The price you sign up for is the price you keep.
whyItMatters.switcher: AT&T raises prices every year; we guarantee yours for 5.

demographicPitch.young-adult: Get on the family plan: entertainment value, T-Satellite, and 2-year upgrades around $47/line with 3 lines.
demographicPitch.family: Everything the family needs: entertainment, T-Satellite, $5 watch lines, and a locked price. Public terms show $140+/mo for 3 lines with AutoPay.
demographicPitch.senior: Streaming, satellite connectivity, and a 5-Year Price Guarantee. Predictable and packed with value.
demographicPitch.business: Equip a small team with premium perks at value pricing — $47/line for 3 lines.
demographicPitch.budget: More perks than Essentials at a similar per-line price when you have 3+ lines. The math works.
demographicPitch.switcher: Switch 3 lines, get entertainment value, T-Satellite, and family pricing. Verify the 2-port requirement before quoting.

planSellingGuide.upgradeFrom: You're on Essentials and missing streaming, T-Satellite, and better device deals. Better Value adds all of that for roughly the same per-line cost with 3 lines.

planSellingGuide.idealCustomer: Light users, seniors on fixed income, people who just need the basics.
planSellingGuide.whyNotCheaper: Essentials Saver exists but misses even basic promo eligibility.
planSellingGuide.whyNotPricier: If they watch any streaming or want device deals, Experience More pays for itself.

whyItMatters.young-adult: No data caps, no overages — just use your phone.
whyItMatters.family: Everyone gets unlimited without worrying about usage.
whyItMatters.senior: Simple unlimited — call, text, and browse without tracking data.
whyItMatters.business: Basic unlimited coverage for light business use.
whyItMatters.budget: Truly unlimited at the lowest price point.
whyItMatters.switcher: Same T-Mobile 5G network as our premium plans.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Full 5G speeds on T-Mobile's nationwide network.
whyItMatters.family: Everyone connects on 5G — no extra charge.
whyItMatters.senior: Fast, reliable connections for video calls and browsing.
whyItMatters.business: 5G speeds for email, messaging, and basic cloud apps.
whyItMatters.budget: 5G included at no premium — other carriers charge more for it.
whyItMatters.switcher: T-Mobile has the largest 5G network in the country.

whyItMatters.young-adult: Eligible switchers may still have a no-trade iPhone 17e path.
whyItMatters.family: Check whether the kids' lines qualify before pitching a device outcome.
whyItMatters.senior: A newer iPhone may be possible without jumping to a premium plan, if the account qualifies.
whyItMatters.business: Light users may qualify for a lower-cost phone path.
whyItMatters.budget: Verify the $45+/mo service and port-in requirements before using this as the close.
whyItMatters.switcher: Switching can unlock the iPhone 17e path, but eligibility matters.

whyItMatters.young-adult: More money for everything else in your life.
whyItMatters.family: Keep the wireless bill minimal for lines that don't need extras.
whyItMatters.senior: Straightforward plan with no confusing add-ons.
whyItMatters.business: Lowest cost per line for basic connectivity.
whyItMatters.budget: The absolute cheapest unlimited plan from T-Mobile.
whyItMatters.switcher: Start simple and upgrade later if you want more perks.

demographicPitch.young-adult: Unlimited everything on 5G at the lowest price. Upgrade to Experience More later if you want streaming perks.
demographicPitch.family: Basic unlimited for lines that just need the essentials. $30/line for 3 lines with AutoPay.
demographicPitch.senior: Simple, affordable unlimited. No frills, no confusion, and iPhone 17e On Us.
demographicPitch.business: Lowest-cost unlimited for team members who just need talk, text, and data.
demographicPitch.budget: $30/line for 3 lines with AutoPay — the most affordable unlimited plan we offer.
demographicPitch.switcher: Switchers may qualify for the iPhone 17e offer. Start simple and upgrade later if you want more.

planSellingGuide.upgradeFrom: Essentials Saver saves a few dollars but loses promo eligibility — Essentials is the true entry point.
